title: strychnos scheffleri
intro: Strychnos scheffleri, also known as the Scheffler's tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Strychnos scheffleri are attributed to its seeds, which contain a high concentration of strychnine, a powerful alkaloid with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Traditionally, Strychnos scheffleri is prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the seeds in water to make a herbal tea, which is used to treat various ailments.
